title: Glass Salt and Pepper Shaker Pot Set of 2 Classic Clear Glass Traditional Cruet Set Cafe-Style Dispenser Bottles
features: Classic salt and pepper shaker set for your essential seasoning storage. Set of salt and pepper shaker pots made from durable superior quality and clarity clear glass with the intials “S” and “P” embossed on the glass surface and screw top plastic lids, for yourself to easily find and add seasoning to food. They are the perfect hand fit to pick up and add flavour! Ideal set which can be placed at the centre of the table or on your countertop.
Dimensions of this glass salt and pepper shaker set are – Salt: Height: 9.5cm and Diameter: 4.5cm / Pepper: Height: 8.5cm and Diameter: 4.5cm. This glass salt and pepper pot set IS DISHWASHER SAFE.
Ideal for use at home, restaurants, pubs, cafes & during catering services.

CLEAR GLASS STRUCTURE TO IDENTIFY CONTENT - These salt and pepper shakers are structured from high-quality clear and thick glass to allow easy identification of the content each shaker holds. Clear glass shall also inform you when stock is running low and needs refilling. These shakers are a handy tool to pour out small quantities.

SUPPORTIVE EMBOSSED GLASS DESIGN – Along with everyday use, these glass salt and pepper shaker set is useful for those who are elderly, partially sighted or even children. As each individual shake has the letter “S” and “P” embossed, they will be able to touch and tell which shaker holds salt or pepper.
